title: CosmeticAnew
description: Adds new Clothing like Trinkets, for customization purposes.
body:
# CosmeticAnew
Adds in new Clothing and 1 Mob into the game.

## Clothing
- A new way to customize your character in game.
- Works for both Base and Slim skins.
- Currently 8 Clothing selections available.
## Available Clothing:
1. Royal Mantle (Found in Bastion Treasuries)
2. Nostalgic Clothing (Plains Villages)
3. Casual Clothing (Bought From Clothier)
4. Fancy Suit (Bought From Clothier)
5. Lumber Clothing (Bought From Clothier)
6. Desert Wanderer (Desert Temples)
7. Wandering Trader Clothing (Bought from Wandering Traders)
8. Illager Clothing (Woodland Mansion and Outposts)

## Clothier
- A friendly cat merchant that can be spawned in via a Clothiers Coin.
- Clothiers Coin can be found in Mineshafts, Ruined Portals, Desert Pyramids and Dungeons.
- ~~Can be pet while crouching~~
